import os


class UserService:
    def get_user(self, user_id: int) -> dict:
        db_url = os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", "sqlite:///default.db")
        max_retries = int(os.getenv("MAX_RETRIES", "3"))
        return {"id": user_id, "db": db_url, "retries": max_retries}


class EmailService:
    def send_welcome(self, user_email: str) -> None:
        smtp_host = os.getenv("SMTP_HOST", "localhost")
        smtp_port = int(os.getenv("SMTP_PORT", "587"))
        from_addr = os.getenv("FROM_EMAIL", "noreply@example.com")
        print(f"Sending from {from_addr} via {smtp_host}:{smtp_port} to {user_email}")


class CacheService:
    def get(self, key: str) -> str | None:
        redis_url = os.getenv("REDIS_URL", "redis://localhost:6379")
        ttl = int(os.getenv("CACHE_TTL", "300"))
        return None
